mapper.select: SELECT bh.id, bh.user_id, bh.room_id, bh.browse_time, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.name apartment_name, ai.district_name, ai.city_name, ai.province_name FROM browsing_history AS bh LEFT JOIN room_info AS ri ON bh.room_id = ri.id AND ri.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN apartment_info as ai ON ri.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 WHERE bh.is_deleted = 0 AND bh.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY bh.browse_time DESC
SELECT name, url FROM graph_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND item_type = 2 AND item_id = #{room_id}
